topics.name: कलम शब्द का परिचय और लेखन अभ्यास
topics.summary: This topic introduces the Hindi word 'कलम' (pen) through visual representation and text. It then focuses on the individual letters 'क', 'ल', 'म' that form the word, providing extensive tracing and writing practice for both the letters and the complete word.

topics.name: ऐ अक्षर और ऐनक शब्द का परिचय
topics.summary: This topic introduces the Hindi vowel letter 'ऐ' (ai) and the word 'ऐनक' (ainak - spectacles). It covers identification, tracing, writing, reading, and associating 'ऐ' with relevant pictures and words.

topics.name: घर शब्द का परिचय
topics.summary: This topic introduces the Hindi word 'घर' (house) and its constituent letters 'घ' and 'र'. It includes various exercises for letter and word recognition, tracing, writing, and forming simple sentences, often integrating review words from previous chapters to build foundational literacy skills.

topics.name: Introduction to Letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' and Basic Words
topics.summary: Introduces the Hindi letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' through the word 'मटर' and other related vocabulary, focusing on visual and auditory recognition.

topics.name: Word Building, Reading, and Writing Practice
topics.summary: Focuses on reading and writing words formed using 'म', 'ट', 'र', including tracing and matching activities to reinforce learning.

topics.name: Application and Creative Expression
topics.summary: Applies learned letters and words in handwriting, sentence completion, new word formation, and drawing activities.

topics.name: Comprehensive Review and Reinforcement
topics.summary: A set of comprehensive exercises designed to review and reinforce all concepts introduced in the chapter, including letter and word recognition, reading, writing, and application.

topics.name: फल
topics.summary: This topic introduces the word 'फल' (fruit) and simple sentences using it. It focuses on reading, writing, and identifying the word 'फल' and its constituent letters.

topics.name: Introduction to 'अदरक' and its Letters
topics.summary: This topic introduces the word 'अदरक' (ginger) through visual recognition and tracing, focusing on the identification of its constituent letters 'अ', 'द', 'र', 'क'.

topics.name: Identifying Words with 'अ' and 'द'
topics.summary: Activities designed to help students identify words that contain the letters 'अ' and 'द' from a given set of pictures and their names.

topics.name: Reading and Writing Practice
topics.summary: Comprehensive practice for reading, tracing, and writing words formed using the letters 'अ', 'द', 'र', 'क', including matching words to pictures and filling in blanks.

topics.name: Creative and Reinforcement Activities
topics.summary: Activities that encourage creativity through drawing and coloring, and reinforce letter recognition by identifying learned letters within a full alphabet chart.

topics.name: चरखा का परिचय (सुनी-बोलो)
topics.summary: Introduction to the spinning wheel (Charakha) through listening and speaking activities, including a song and discussion questions.

topics.name: चरखा शब्द का पठन और समझ (पढ़ो)
topics.summary: Reading and comprehension activities focused on the word 'चरखा', including identifying its letters and understanding a short story based on pictures.

topics.name: अक्षर पहचान (च, र, ख, आ)
topics.summary: Visual identification of the letters च, र, ख, and the 'आ' matra from the word 'चरखा' and its image.

topics.name: अक्षर उच्चारण और शब्द निर्माण
topics.summary: Practicing the pronunciation of individual letters (च, र, ख, आ) and forming simple words by combining them.

topics.name: अक्षर-आधारित शब्द अंकन
topics.summary: An activity to mark words based on the presence of specific letters (च, र, ख, आ).

topics.name: तेज शब्द पठन
topics.summary: An exercise designed to improve reading fluency by quickly reading pairs of words.

topics.name: लेखन अभ्यास (लिखो)
topics.summary: Writing practice for the letters च, र, ख, and the 'आ' matra through tracing.

topics.name: बरगद का परिचय
topics.summary: Introduction to the word 'बरगद' (banyan tree) through visual recognition and simple sentences.

topics.name: बरगद शब्द का पठन
topics.summary: Reading and recognizing the word 'बरगद' and its constituent letters 'ब', 'र', 'ग', 'द' in various contexts.

topics.name: बरगद शब्द का लेखन
topics.summary: Practicing writing the letters 'ब', 'र', 'ग', 'द' and the complete word 'बरगद'.

topics.name: अभ्यास
topics.summary: Comprehensive exercises to reinforce learning related to the word 'बरगद' and its associated concepts.

topics.name: 'उ' स्वर और 'ु' मात्रा का परिचय
topics.summary: This topic introduces the short vowel sound 'उ' (u) and its corresponding matra 'ु'. It covers recognition, writing, and reading words and simple sentences containing this sound.

topics.name: 'ऊ' स्वर और 'ू' मात्रा का परिचय
topics.summary: This topic introduces the long vowel sound 'ऊ' (oo) and its corresponding matra 'ू'. It covers recognition, writing, and reading words and simple sentences containing this sound.

topics.name: 'उ' और 'ऊ' मात्राओं का अभ्यास
topics.summary: This topic provides combined practice for differentiating and using both 'ु' and 'ू' matras in words and sentences, along with comprehension and creative activities.

topics.name: Introduction to 'ओ' and 'औ' vowels
topics.summary: Introduces the Hindi vowels 'ओ' (o) and 'औ' (au) through visual recognition of objects and words starting with these sounds.

topics.name: Forming and Writing Words with 'ओ' and 'औ'
topics.summary: Focuses on combining 'ओ' and 'औ' with other letters to form new words and practicing writing these letters and words.

topics.name: Alphabet Chart Review
topics.summary: A cumulative review activity where students mark all the letters they have learned so far in a complete Hindi alphabet chart, including 'ओ' and 'औ'.

topics.name: Reading and Comprehension of 'ओखली' (Mortar)
topics.summary: Introduces the word 'ओखली' through a short poem, followed by comprehension questions and word identification exercises.

topics.name: Reading and Comprehension of 'औषध' (Medicine)
topics.summary: Introduces the word 'औषध' through a short poem, followed by comprehension questions and word identification exercises.

topics.name: अक्षर 'ठ' की पहचान और लेखन
topics.summary: This topic focuses on introducing the Hindi letter 'ठ' (tha) through visual recognition, tracing, writing, and identifying words that contain the letter 'ठ'.

topics.name: अक्षर लेखन और पठन
topics.summary: This topic focuses on tracing and reading individual Hindi letters and simple two-letter words.

topics.name: मात्रा पहचान और शब्द चयन
topics.summary: Identifying and selecting words from a given list that contain specific Hindi matras (vowel signs).

topics.name: सुंदर अक्षर लेखन अभ्यास
topics.summary: Practice writing various Hindi letters neatly in a grid for improved handwriting.

topics.name: चित्र देखकर रिक्त स्थान भरिए
topics.summary: Filling in the blanks in sentences by identifying the correct word based on accompanying images.

topics.name: मात्राएँ जोड़कर लिखिए
topics.summary: Combining Hindi consonants with different matras (vowel signs) to form new syllables or words in a grid format.

topics.name: मेले की कहानी
topics.summary: A short story about a boy named Ravi visiting a fair, depicted through a series of illustrations. The word 'झोला' (bag) is visible in the context of the story.

topics.name: The 'ओ' (o) Vowel Sound and Matra (ो)
topics.summary: This topic introduces the 'ओ' vowel sound and its corresponding matra (ो) using the word 'झोला'. It includes various exercises for recognition, pronunciation, reading, and writing words containing this matra.

topics.name: Word Formation and Matra-based Word Identification
topics.summary: Students practice forming words by joining letters and identifying words based on specific vowel signs (matras) from a given list.

topics.name: Handwriting Practice
topics.summary: Students practice writing Hindi letters with specific matras neatly in a grid format.

topics.name: Picture-based Sentence Completion
topics.summary: Students identify objects from pictures and use the correct Hindi word to complete sentences.

topics.name: Picture-Word Matching
topics.summary: Students match given pictures with their corresponding Hindi words.

topics.name: वर्णमाला और मात्राओं का पुनरावृत्ति
topics.summary: This topic focuses on revising the Hindi alphabet, including special characters and vowel marks (Barahkhadi), through pronunciation and writing exercises.

topics.name: शब्द और वाक्य अभ्यास
topics.summary: This topic involves forming words from given letters, identifying words based on length, arranging words, and reading/writing simple sentences related to common objects and actions.

topics.name: सामान्य ज्ञान और रचनात्मक लेखन
topics.summary: This topic includes exercises that test general knowledge about familiar objects, personal information, and creative activities like dot-to-dot drawing and descriptive writing.

topics.name: पठन अभ्यास
topics.summary: This topic provides a reading passage in the form of a poem or song, focusing on days of the week and associated activities, to enhance reading fluency.

topics.name: सीखने की प्रक्रिया के निर्देश
topics.summary: This topic outlines various instructions and methods for effective learning, including listening, speaking, reading, writing, imaginative play, and critical thinking.

subtopics.summary: Visual and textual introduction to the word 'कलम' (pen) with an accompanying image.

subtopics.name: ऐ अक्षर की पहचान
subtopics.summary: Activities focused on identifying the letter 'ऐ' within words, sentences, and a grid of letters.

subtopics.name: ऐ अक्षर और ऐनक शब्द का लेखन अभ्यास

subtopics.name: ऐ से शुरू होने वाले शब्दों का पठन
subtopics.summary: Reading words that begin with the letter 'ऐ', such as ऐनक, ऐरावत, ऐल्बम, and other related words.

subtopics.name: ऐ से संबंधित वाक्यों का पठन और लेखन
subtopics.summary: Reading and writing simple sentences containing words that start with 'ऐ'.

subtopics.summary: Exercises involving matching pictures to their correct names or identifying the starting letter from a given picture.

subtopics.summary: Activities for coloring the letter 'ऐ' and completing/coloring the picture of 'ऐनक' (spectacles).

subtopics.name: शब्द और चित्र मिलान
subtopics.summary: Activity to match pictures (ऐनक, 1, कलम, नल) with their corresponding words (नल, कलम, ऐनक, एक). This serves as a review and reinforces word-picture association, including words that build up to the letters of 'घर'.

subtopics.name: अक्षर अनुरेखण और लेखन अभ्यास

subtopics.name: सूची से शब्द पहचान और लेखन

subtopics.name: निर्देशित शब्द लेखन

subtopics.summary: An activity where students draw a given object (ऐनक) and write its name, combining visual and linguistic skills.

subtopics.name: वर्णमाला चार्ट की पुनरावृत्ति और अंकन
subtopics.summary: Reviewing the Hindi alphabet chart and marking letters that have been learned so far, consolidating letter recognition.

subtopics.name: Visual and Auditory Recognition of 'म', 'ट', 'र' and 'मटर'
subtopics.summary: Students learn to recognize the letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' and the word 'मटर' visually and aurally.

subtopics.name: Oral Practice and Sequencing of Letters
subtopics.summary: Students practice speaking the individual letters and combining them to form words.

subtopics.summary: Students identify words that contain specific target letters ('म', 'ट', 'र').

subtopics.summary: Students practice reading various words constructed using the letters 'म', 'ट', 'र'.

subtopics.summary: Students practice writing the letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' and related words by tracing dotted outlines.

चित्र में क्या दिखाई दे रहा है? (मौखिक प्रश्न)
सही शब्द के साथ चित्र जोड़िए। (Match pictures with the correct words.) Activity involves matching images of 'ऐनक' (glasses), '1' (one), 'कलम' (pen), 'नल' (tap) with the words 'नल', 'कलम', 'ऐनक', 'एक'.
बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए। मिलाकर पढ़िए। (Join the dots to write the letters. Read them together.) Tracing activity for letters 'न', 'ल', 'ए', 'क', 'म', 'घ', 'र' and then writing them in lines below.

तालिका में से एक जैसे शब्द चुनकर लिखिए। (Choose similar words from the table and write them.) Students are to select and write specific words (implied target words: ऐनक, एक, नल, नमक, घर, कलम, मटर) from a given table containing words: 'ऐनक', 'सड़क', 'नमक', 'जग', 'एक', 'घर', 'नल'.

सुंदर अक्षरों में निम्नलिखित शब्द लिखिए। (Write the following words in beautiful letters.) Practice writing the words 'ऐनक', 'एक', 'नल', 'नमक' (as listed in the instruction text) in neat handwriting on provided lines.

चित्र देखकर रिक्त स्थानों में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Look at the picture and write the correct word in the blanks.) Fill in the blanks in sentences based on pictures: 1. Image: Glasses (ऐनक). Sentence: मेज़ पर ______ है। 2. Image: Number 1 (एक). Sentence: हम सब ______ हैं। 3. Image: Tap (नल). Sentence: ______ से पानी आता है।
न, घ, र, क, ल इन अक्षरों से नए शब्द बनाइए। (Make new words from these letters: न, घ, र, क, ल.) Create new words using the given letters. Examples provided: 'एक', 'नमक'.
चित्र देखिए। चित्र बनाइए। नाम लिखिए। (Look at the picture. Draw the picture. Write the name.) Draw the picture of 'ऐनक' (glasses) and write its name.
अब तक सीखे हुए अक्षरों पर वर्णमाला चार्ट में 'O' लगाइए। (Mark 'O' on the letters learned so far in the alphabet chart.) Identify and mark learned letters on a full Hindi alphabet chart.

(अ) चित्र देखिए। शब्द पढ़िए। अक्षर पहचानिए। (Look at the picture. Read the word. Identify the letter.) - Activity involves an image of 'मटर' (peas), the word 'मटर', and individual letters 'म', 'ट', 'र'.
(आ) बक्से में दिए गए अक्षर बोलिए। (Speak the letters given in the box.) - Activity involves speaking the letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' presented in numbered boxes (1, 2, 3).

Questions: पहला अक्षर कौन-सा है? दूसरा अक्षर कौन-सा है? तीसरा अक्षर कौन-सा है? 1, 2, 3 अक्षर मिलाकर पढ़िए। (What is the first letter? What is the second letter? What is the third letter? Read by combining letters 1, 2, 3.)

(इ) चित्र के आधार पर बिंदी के नाम बोलिए। 'म' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर 'O' लगाइए। 'ट' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर '✓' लगाइए। 'र' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर 'X' लगाइए। (Based on the picture, say the names of the dots. Mark 'O' on words with letter 'म'. Mark '✓' on words with letter 'ट'. Mark 'X' on words with letter 'र'.) - Activity involves identifying words from images (मटर, टमाटर, मगर, रथ, टमटम, मटका) and marking them based on the presence of specific letters.
(ई) म, ट, र अक्षरों से बनने वाले शब्द पढ़िए। (Read words formed by letters म, ट, र.) - Activity involves reading words like मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम.
(उ) जल्दी-जल्दी पढ़िए। (Read quickly.) - Activity involves rapid reading of a table containing words like मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम.

(ऊ) बिन्दु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए। मिलाकर पढ़िए। (Join the dots to write letters. Read by combining.) - Activity involves tracing dotted outlines of letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' and words like 'मटर', 'टमाटर', 'मगर', 'मटका', 'रथ', 'टमटम'.
(ए) तालिका में से एक जैसे शब्दों को चुनकर लिखिए। (Choose and write similar words from the table.) - Activity involves matching identical words from two tables and writing them in blank boxes.
(ऐ) सुंदर अक्षरों में निम्नलिखित शब्द लिखिए। (Write the following words in beautiful handwriting.) - Activity involves writing words like मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम on provided lines.

(ओ) देखकर रिक्त स्थान में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Look and write the correct word in the blank.) - Activity involves completing 6 sentences with blanks by identifying the correct word from images (e.g., image of a pea pod for 'मटर', tomato for 'टमाटर', crocodile for 'मगर', pot for 'मटका', chariot for 'रथ', horse-cart for 'टमटम').

(औ) शब्द पढ़िए। चित्र देखिए। खाली जगह में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Read the word. Look at the picture. Write the correct word in the blank space.) - Activity involves completing 6 sentences with blanks by identifying the correct word from images (e.g., image of a pea pod for 'मटर', tomato for 'टमाटर', crocodile for 'मगर', pot for 'मटका', chariot for 'रथ', horse-cart for 'टमटम').
(अं) म, ट, र - इन अक्षरों से नए शब्द लिखिए। (Write new words using letters म, ट, र.) - Activity involves writing three new words using the given letters.

(क) चित्र देखिए! चित्र बनाइए! नाम लिखिए! (Look at the picture! Draw the picture! Write the name!) - Activity involves looking at an image of a pea pod, drawing it in a blank box, and writing its name.

(ख) चित्र देखिए। शब्द पढ़िए। अक्षर पहचानिए। (Look at the picture. Read the word. Identify the letter.) - Activity involves images of मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम, with their words and individual letters for identification.
(ग) बक्से में दिए गए अक्षर बोलिए। (Speak the letters given in the box.) - Activity involves speaking the letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' presented in numbered boxes (1, 2, 3).

Questions: पहला अक्षर कौन-सा है? दूसरा अक्षर कौन-सा है? तीसरा अक्षर कौन-सा है? 1, 2, 3 अक्षर मिलाकर पढ़िए। (What is the first letter? What is the second letter? What is the third letter? Read by combining letters 1, 2, 3.)

(ङ) म, ट, र अक्षरों से बनने वाले शब्द पढ़िए। (Read words formed by letters म, ट, र.) - Activity involves reading words like मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम.
(च) जल्दी-जल्दी पढ़िए। (Read quickly.) - Activity involves rapid reading of a table containing words like मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम.

(छ) बिन्दु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए। मिलाकर पढ़िए। (Join the dots to write letters. Read by combining.) - Activity involves tracing dotted outlines of letters 'म', 'ट', 'र' and words like 'मटर', 'टमाटर', 'मगर', 'मटका', 'रथ', 'टमटम'.
(ज) तालिका में से एक जैसे शब्दों को चुनकर लिखिए। (Choose and write similar words from the table.) - Activity involves matching identical words from two tables and writing them in blank boxes.
(झ) सुंदर अक्षरों में निम्नलिखित शब्द लिखिए। (Write the following words in beautiful handwriting.) - Activity involves writing words like मटर, टमाटर, मगर, मटका, रथ, टमटम on provided lines.

(ञ) देखकर रिक्त स्थान में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Look and write the correct word in the blank.) - Activity involves completing 6 sentences with blanks by identifying the correct word from images (e.g., image of a pea pod for 'मटर', tomato for 'टमाटर', crocodile for 'मगर', pot for 'मटका', chariot for 'रथ', horse-cart for 'टमटम').

(ट) शब्द पढ़िए। चित्र देखिए। खाली जगह में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Read the word. Look at the picture. Write the correct word in the blank space.) - Activity involves completing 6 sentences with blanks by identifying the correct word from images (e.g., image of a pea pod for 'मटर', tomato for 'टमाटर', crocodile for 'मगर', pot for 'मटका', chariot for 'रथ', horse-cart for 'टमटम').
(ठ) म, ट, र - इन अक्षरों से नए शब्द लिखिए। (Write new words using letters म, ट, र.) - Activity involves writing three new words using the given letters.

(ड) चित्र देखिए! चित्र बनाइए! नाम लिखिए! (Look at the picture! Draw the picture! Write the name!) - Activity involves looking at an image of a pea pod, drawing it in a blank box, and writing its name.
पढ़ो और बोलो: Read and speak the word 'फल' and sentences like 'फल खा', 'फल चख', 'फल रख', 'फल मत रख', 'फल चख कर खा', 'फल रख कर खा', 'फल चख कर मत खा', 'फल रख कर मत खा'.
बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए: Trace the dotted letters 'फ' and 'ल' and write them.
अक्षर पढ़िए और लिखिए: Read the letters 'फ' and 'ल' and write them in the provided space.
शब्द पढ़िए और लिखिए: Read the word 'फल' and write it in the provided space.
चित्र देखकर शब्द लिखिए: Look at the image of a fruit basket and write the word 'फल'.
बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए: Trace the dotted letters 'फ' and 'ल' and write them.
अक्षर पढ़िए और लिखिए: Read the letters 'फ' and 'ल' and write them in the provided space.
शब्द पढ़िए और लिखिए: Read the word 'फल' and write it in the provided space.
चित्र देखिए। शब्द पढ़िए। अक्षर पहचानिए। वर्णमाला के चार्ट में भी इन्हें पहचानिए। (Look at the picture. Read the word. Identify the letters. Also identify them in the alphabet chart.)
नीचे दिए गए अक्षर बोलिए। (Speak the letters given below.) - Letters: अ, द, र, क.

चित्र के अक्षर पढ़िए। चित्रों के नाम बोलिए। 'अ' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर 'O' लगाइए। 'द' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर '✓' लगाइए। (Read the letters of the pictures. Speak the names of the pictures. Put 'O' on words with letter 'अ'. Put '✓' on words with letter 'द'.) - Images: अदरक, अनार, दवात, दस, अनपढ़, अमरूद.
दिए गए शब्द पढ़िए। (Read the given words.) - Words: अदरक, अदब, दरद, दमक, अदक, अदल, दमन, दहन.
दिए गए चित्र सही नाम से मिलाइए। (Match the given pictures with their correct names.) - Images: अदरक, अनार, दस, दवात. Names: दस, अनार, अदरक, दवात.
लिखो (Write) - Tracing exercise for 'अदरक', 'अदब', 'दरद', 'दमक'.
बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर पढ़िए। मिलाकर लिखिए। (Join the dots, read the letters. Join and write.) - Tracing and writing practice for 'अ', 'द', 'र', 'क' and words like 'अदरक', 'अदब', 'दरद', 'दमक'.
नीचे दिए गए अक्षर मिलाकर पढ़िए और लिखिए। (Join the letters given below, read and write.) - Letter combinations to form words: अदरक, अदब, दरद, दमक.
समान अक्षर वाले गुब्बारों की जोड़ी बनाइए। अक्षर लिखिए। (Make pairs of balloons with the same letter. Write the letters.) - Letters: अ, द, र, क.
सुंदर अक्षरों में निम्नलिखित शब्द लिखिए। (Write the following words in beautiful handwriting.) - Words: अदरक, अदब, दरद, दमक.
चित्र देखकर रिक्त स्थान में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Look at the picture and write the correct word in the blank.) - Images: ginger, pomegranate, number ten, inkpot.
चित्र देखिए। चित्र बनाइए। नाम लिखिए। रंग भरिए। (Look at the picture. Draw the picture. Write the name. Fill in the color.) - Image: अदरक.
अब तक सीखे हुए अक्षरों पर वर्णमाला चार्ट में 'O' लगाइए। (Put 'O' on the letters learned so far in the alphabet chart.) - Focus on 'अ', 'द', 'र', 'क' for this chapter.
गीत गाइए। अभिनय करिए।
चरखा कौन लाया?
चरखा का स्वाद कैसा होता है?
(अ) गीत में 'चरखा' शब्द पहचानकर 'O' लगाइए।
(आ) 'चरखा' शब्द को अक्षरों को वर्णमाला में पहचानिए। स्पष्ट बोलिए।
(इ) चित्रों के आधार पर कहानी समझिए। (Images show a boy and girl with a charkha, and then a boy and girl spinning yarn, with the text 'चरखा चलाओ।')
वाक्यों में 'चरखा' शब्द पहचानकर 'O' लगाइए।
(ई) चित्र देखिए। शब्द पढ़िए। अक्षर पहचानिए। (Image of a spinning wheel, word 'चरखा', and letters च, र, ख, आ)
(उ) बक्से में दिए गए अक्षर बोलिए। (Letters: च, र, ख, आ)
पहला अक्षर कौन-सा है? दूसरा अक्षर कौन-सा है? तीसरा अक्षर कौन-सा है? चौथा अक्षर क्या है?
2, 3 अक्षर मिलाकर पढ़िए। 4, 3 अक्षर मिलाकर पढ़िए। 4, 2, 3 अक्षर मिलाकर पढ़िए। (Expected words: रख, आख, आख)
(ऊ) 'च' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर 'O' लगाइए। 'र' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर '/' लगाइए। 'ख' अक्षर पर '____' लगाइए। 'आ' अक्षर पर 'x' लगाइए। (Words to mark: चरखा, रख, आम, चर, खत)
(ए) जल्दी-जल्दी पढ़िए। (Word pairs: चर-चर, रख-रख, खत-खत, आम-आम)
(अ) बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए। मिलाकर पढ़िए। (Tracing exercise for letters च, र, ख, आ (with 'ा' matra))
बरगद का चित्र देखकर उसका नाम बताइए। (Look at the picture of the banyan tree and tell its name.)
दिए गए शब्दों में से 'बरगद' शब्द पहचानकर 'O' लगाइए। (Identify and circle the word 'बरगद' from the given words.)
'ब' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर '✓' और 'द' अक्षर वाले शब्दों पर 'x' लगाइए। (Mark words starting with 'ब' with '✓' and words starting with 'द' with 'x'.)
बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए: ब, र, ग, द। (Join the dots and write the letters: ब, र, ग, द.)

'ऊ' अक्षर और 'ू' मात्रा का अनुरेखण करें। (Trace the letter 'ऊ' and the matra 'ू'.)
दिए गए अक्षरों में 'ू' मात्रा लगाकर शब्द पूरे करें। (Complete the words by adding the 'ू' matra to the given letters.)

चित्रों को उनके सही नाम से मिलाएँ। (Match the pictures to their correct names.)

चित्र देखिए। शब्द पढ़िए। अक्षर पहचानिए। मात्रा समझिए। (Look at the picture. Read the word. Identify the letter. Understand the matra.) - Image of a 'ठेला' (cart) with vegetables, and the word 'ठेला' broken down into 'ठ', 'े', 'ल', 'ा'.

ठ अक्षर को सही जगह पर लिखो। (Write the letter 'ठ' in the correct place.) - Fill in the blanks to complete words: ...ग (ठग), पा... (पाठ), ...ंड (ठंड), ...ठेरा (ठठेरा), ...ोकर (ठोकर), ...ुमका (ठुमका), ...ुकराना (ठुकराना), ...िठुरना (ठिठुरना), ...िठोली (ठिठोली).
बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए। मिलाकर पढ़िए। (Trace and read the letters by joining the dots: डे, ला, से, ना, ठ, डे, रा, च, ने)
अक्षरों को मिलाकर लिखिए। (Join the letters and write: डेला, पासे, मसा)

सुंदर अक्षरों में लिखिए। (Write the given letters 'ठ', 'ट', 'प', 'ल', 'म', 'रे', 'वे', 'के', 'घे', 'फे', 'बे', 'वे', 'से', 'ते', 'दे' neatly in the grid.)
चित्र देखकर रिक्त स्थान में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Look at the picture of a vegetable cart and fill in the blank: 'तरकारियों का .......... आया है।')
चित्र देखकर रिक्त स्थान में सही शब्द लिखिए। (Look at the picture of a potter and fill in the blank: 'बरतन बनाने वाले को .......... कहते हैं।')

रवि एक दिन मेला गया। उस मेले में उसने क्या किया, बताइए। (Ravi went to a fair one day. Tell what he did in that fair, based on the story and images.)

Trace the dotted letters to write the words 'भो ला', 'झो ला', and 'क टो री', and then read them aloud.

topics.topic_name: कलम शब्द का परिचय और लेखन अभ्यास

topics.concept_summary: Visual identification of the letters च, र, ख, and the 'आ' matra from the word 'चरखा' and its image.

subtopics.summary: Identifying individual letters (च, र, ख, आ) from the word 'चरखा' presented with an image.

topics.concept_summary: Practicing the pronunciation of individual letters (च, र, ख, आ) and forming simple words by combining them.

subtopics.subtopic_name: अक्षरों का उच्चारण और क्रम पहचान
subtopics.summary: Speaking letters and identifying their positions, then combining them to form new words.

topics.concept_summary: An activity to mark words based on the presence of specific letters (च, र, ख, आ).

subtopics.subtopic_name: विशिष्ट अक्षरों वाले शब्दों को चिह्नित करना
subtopics.summary: Marking words from a given list that contain the target letters च, र, ख, or आ.

topics.concept_summary: An exercise designed to improve reading fluency by quickly reading pairs of words.

subtopics.subtopic_name: दोहराए गए शब्दों का त्वरित पठन
subtopics.summary: Reading pairs of identical words rapidly to build reading speed and recognition.

topics.concept_summary: Writing practice for the letters च, र, ख, and the 'आ' matra through tracing.

subtopics.summary: Tracing dotted outlines of letters च, र, ख, and the 'आ' matra to practice writing.

topics.concept_summary: Introduction to the word 'बरगद' (banyan tree) through visual recognition and simple sentences.

subtopics.summary: Identifying the banyan tree from a picture.

topics.concept_summary: Reading and recognizing the word 'बरगद' and its constituent letters 'ब', 'र', 'ग', 'द' in various contexts.

subtopics.summary: Recognizing individual letters 'ब', 'र', 'ग', 'द'.
Reading the full word 'बरगद' and simple sentences containing it.

topics.concept_summary: Practicing writing the letters 'ब', 'र', 'ग', 'द' and the complete word 'बरगद'.

subtopics.summary: Tracing and writing individual letters 'ब', 'र', 'ग', 'द'.
Copying and writing the word 'बरगद'.

topics.concept_summary: Comprehensive exercises to reinforce learning related to the word 'बरगद' and its associated concepts.
This topic introduces the short vowel sound 'उ' (u) and its corresponding matra 'ु'. It covers recognition, writing, and reading words and simple sentences containing this sound.

subtopics.summary: Introduction to the vowel 'उ' with an example word like 'उल्लू' (owl) and its image.
Introduction to the 'ु' matra, showing how it attaches to consonants.
Reading practice for words containing the 'ु' matra, such as पुल (bridge), धुन (tune), सुन (listen).
Reading practice for simple sentences containing words with the 'ु' matra.

topics.concept_summary: This topic introduces the long vowel sound 'ऊ' (oo) and its corresponding matra 'ू'. It covers recognition, writing, and reading words and simple sentences containing this sound.

subtopics.summary: Introduction to the vowel 'ऊ' with an example word like 'ऊन' (wool) and its image.
Introduction to the 'ू' matra, showing how it attaches to consonants.
Reading practice for words containing the 'ू' matra, such as धूप (sunlight), दूध (milk), फूल (flower).
Reading practice for simple sentences containing words with the 'ू' matra.

topics.concept_summary: This topic provides combined practice for differentiating and using both 'ु' and 'ू' matras in words and sentences, along with comprehension and creative activities.

subtopics.subtopic_name: 'उ' और 'ऊ' मात्रा वाले शब्दों का संयुक्त अभ्यास
subtopics.summary: Combined practice for reading and writing words that use both 'ु' and 'ू' matras, focusing on distinguishing between the two sounds.

subtopics.subtopic_name: 'उ' और 'ऊ' मात्रा वाले वाक्यों का संयुक्त अभ्यास
subtopics.summary: Combined practice for reading and understanding sentences that incorporate words with both 'ु' and 'ू' matras.

topics.concept_summary: Introduces the Hindi vowels 'ओ' (o) and 'औ' (au) through visual recognition of objects and words starting with these sounds.

subtopics.summary: Students identify and read words starting with 'ओ' and 'औ' by looking at pictures.
Students practice identifying the individual letters 'ओ' and 'औ' within a given set of words.

subtopics.subtopic_name: Identifying and circling words starting with 'ओ' and 'औ'
subtopics.summary: Students practice identifying and circling entire words that begin with the 'ओ' and 'औ' sounds from a mixed list.

topics.topic_name: Forming and Writing Words with 'ओ' and 'औ'
topics.concept_summary: Focuses on combining 'ओ' and 'औ' with other letters to form new words and practicing writing these letters and words.

subtopics.summary: Students learn to combine 'ओ' and 'औ' with other consonants to create and read simple words.
Students practice writing the letters 'ओ' and 'औ' by tracing dotted lines and then writing them independently.
Students practice writing words containing 'ओ' and 'औ' in neat handwriting.

subtopics.subtopic_name: Filling in blanks with 'ओ' and 'औ' words
subtopics.summary: Students complete sentences by identifying the correct word (starting with 'ओ' or 'औ') based on accompanying pictures.
Students are encouraged to generate new words using the 'ओ' and 'औ' letters.
Students color pictures of objects whose names start with 'ओ' or 'औ' and write their names.

topics.concept_summary: A cumulative review activity where students mark all the letters they have learned so far in a complete Hindi alphabet chart, including 'ओ' and 'औ'.
Introduces the word 'ओखली' through a short poem, followed by comprehension questions and word identification exercises.

subtopics.summary: A short poem describing an 'ओखली' (mortar) and its uses.
Students answer questions orally based on the poem and picture of 'ओखली'.
Students identify and circle the word 'ओखली' within the poem.
Students identify the individual letters that form the word 'ओखली' within the alphabet chart and pronounce them.
Students read simple sentences related to 'ओखली' based on accompanying pictures.

topics.concept_summary: Introduces the word 'औषध' through a short poem, followed by comprehension questions and word identification exercises.

subtopics.summary: A short poem describing 'औषध' (medicine) and its benefits.
Students answer questions orally based on the poem and picture of 'औषध'.
Students identify and circle the word 'औषध' within the poem.
Students identify the individual letters that form the word 'औषध' within the alphabet chart and pronounce them.
Students read simple sentences related to 'औषध' based on accompanying pictures.

topics.concept_summary: This topic focuses on introducing the Hindi letter 'ठ' (tha) through visual recognition, tracing, writing, and identifying words that contain the letter 'ठ'.

subtopics.summary: Introduction to the letter 'ठ' with an image of a 'ठेला' (cart) and other words starting with 'ठ'.
Tracing and writing practice for the letter 'ठ'.
Reading and identifying words containing the letter 'ठ'.
Reading simple sentences related to the theme of 'ठेला' and the letter 'ठ'.
Activities involving identifying and naming objects in pictures, and filling in missing letters.

topics.concept_summary: This topic focuses on tracing and reading individual Hindi letters and simple two-letter words.

subtopics.subtopic_name: बिंदु मिलाकर अक्षर लिखिए। मिलाकर पढ़िए।
subtopics.summary: Tracing and reading individual letters like 'डे', 'ला', 'से', 'ना', 'ठ', 'रा', 'च', 'ने'.
Joining letters to form simple words such as 'डेला', 'पासे', 'मसा'.

topics.concept_summary: Identifying and selecting words from a given list that contain specific Hindi matras (vowel signs).
Practice writing various Hindi letters neatly in a grid for improved handwriting.
Filling in the blanks in sentences by identifying the correct word based on accompanying images.
Combining Hindi consonants with different matras (vowel signs) to form new syllables or words in a grid format.
A short story about a boy named Ravi visiting a fair, depicted through a series of illustrations. The word 'झोला' (bag) is visible in the context of the story.

subtopics.summary: Understanding a narrative through a sequence of images depicting activities at a fair.
Reading and comprehending the short text describing Ravi's visit to the fair.

topics.concept_summary: This topic introduces the 'ओ' vowel sound and its corresponding matra (ो) using the word 'झोला'. It includes various exercises for recognition, pronunciation, reading, and writing words containing this matra.

topics.topic_name: Word Formation and Matra-based Word Identification
topics.concept_summary: Students practice forming words by joining letters and identifying words based on specific vowel signs (matras) from a given list.
Students practice writing Hindi letters with specific matras neatly in a grid format.
Students identify objects from pictures and use the correct Hindi word to complete sentences.
Students match given pictures with their corresponding Hindi words.
This topic focuses on revising the Hindi alphabet, including special characters and vowel marks (Barahkhadi), through pronunciation and writing exercises.
This topic involves forming words from given letters, identifying words based on length, arranging words, and reading/writing simple sentences related to common objects and actions.
This topic includes exercises that test general knowledge about familiar objects, personal information, and creative activities like dot-to-dot drawing and descriptive writing.
This topic provides a reading passage in the form of a poem or song, focusing on days of the week and associated activities, to enhance reading fluency.
This topic outlines various instructions and methods for effective learning, including listening, speaking, reading, writing, imaginative play, and critical thinking.
